steps.title: Identify the outcome the sediments must produce
steps.content: The phrase “eventually forming new portions of land” signals what the sediments' action must accomplish—this is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Match the word to the outcome
steps.content: Accumulate directly explains this: sediments gather and pile up to form new land. The other three contradict the outcome or describe irrelevant processes. That matches choice A — A is correct.
